case_title: OPORTUN INC. (FOMERLY PROGRESS FINANCIAL COPR.) VS. GERSON MAMERTO MATEO CABRERA

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC. (FOMERLY PROGRESS FINANCIAL COPR.)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC. (FOMERLY PROGRESS FINANCIAL COPR.) RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CABRERA, GERSON MAMERTO MATEO $1,012.47 PRINCIPAL, $115.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,127.47 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $65.00 - SERVED SEP-05-2017, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT CABRERA, GERSON MAMERTO MATEO

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF OCT-11-2017 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF OCT-11-2017 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC. IS PRESENT, REPRESENTED BY MARIA BLANC ZOCO, LEGAL COLLECTIONS SPECIALIST. NO APPEARANCE BY THE DEFENDANT GERSON MAMERTO MATEO CABRERA. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL; CLERK: J. MURPHY; NOT REPORTED. (506)

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,012.47 FILED BY OPORTUN INC. (FOMERLY PROGRESS FINANCIAL COPR.) AS TO DEFENDANT CABRERA, GERSON MAMERTO MATEO ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-11-2017 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-11-2017 - JUDGMENT.
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT CABRERA, GERSON MAMERTO MATEO
